title: 11 Herbal Essential Oils For Ulcerative Colitis
description: Cinchona officinalis essential oils contains compounds like quinine, cinchonine, and cinchonidine, which have anti-inflammatory properties. These properties can help with ulcerative colitis by reducing inflammation and pain in the digestive tract. The essential oil may also help to soothe and calm the gut, reducing symptoms such as diarrhea and abdominal cramps.
